---
title: Practice for Exam 2
subtitle: PSY 241 - Spring 2026
date: 2026-03-31
author: Guenther, Benjamin A.
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: false
    html-math-method: mathjax
    self-contained-math: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import importlib
import stats_project 
import random

# This is to clear cache and reload after edits to the .py file
importlib.reload(stats_project)
from stats_project import RandomData 
```

## *z-scores {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| label: z-scores
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).z_test()
```

## one-sample *t*-tests {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| label: one-sample t-tests
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 1, n = sample_size).one_sample_t_test()
```

## independent-samples *t*-tests {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| label: independent-sample t-tests
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 2, n = sample_size).independent_samples_t_test()
```

## dependent-samples *t*-tests {.scrollable}
```{python}
#| label: dependent-sample t-tests
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
sample_size = random.randint(5,15)
RandomData(groups = 2, n = sample_size).dependent_samples_t_test()
```
